phrases.en: Pam picks up her phone and unlocks the screen.
phrases.zh: 帕姆拿起手机，解锁屏幕。

phrases.en: She opens the chat app and taps her friend's name.
phrases.zh: 她打开聊天应用，点击朋友的名字。

phrases.en: The empty chat window appears at the bottom.
phrases.zh: 底部出现了空白的聊天窗口。

phrases.en: She finds the small microphone button beside the text box.
phrases.zh: 她在文本框旁边找到那个小小的麦克风按钮。

phrases.en: Pam presses and holds the microphone button firmly.
phrases.zh: 帕姆稳稳地按住麦克风按钮。

phrases.en: A timer starts to count the seconds.
She speaks her message slowly and clearly.
phrases.zh: 她缓慢而清晰地说出自己的消息。

phrases.en: She lets go of the button when she finishes talking.
Pam taps the play arrow to listen back to the recording.
phrases.zh: 帕姆点击播放箭头，回听这段录音。

phrases.en: Her own voice sounds a little quiet.
phrases.zh: 她自己的声音听起来有点小。

phrases.en: She deletes the message and records it again.
phrases.zh: 她删掉这条消息，重新录了一遍。

phrases.en: This time the voice message sounds clear and friendly.
phrases.zh: 这一次，语音消息听起来清晰又亲切。

phrases.en: Pam taps the blue send button confidently.
phrases.zh: 帕姆自信地点击蓝色的发送按钮。

phrases.en: The voice message appears in the chat right away.
phrases.zh: 语音消息立刻出现在聊天里。
